data.body: STATUS (handoff): IMPLEMENTED + COMMITTED as stack commit 068ba1842. Plan-review PASS+signed (round 3, after 2 remediations — the gate correctly BLOCKED my original Pass-1-injection design as an ADR-0008 finder-independence violation; pivoted to a post-Pass-1 recall step). Pre-commit lint+mypy PASSED; tests/unit/test_pass1_recall.py (9) + independence suite green. NOT CLOSED: awaiting Gerrit Verified.
